benefits.description: Significant difference in weight loss; major improvement after negative experience with prescription medication
Maintaining weight loss on retatrutide break for 3 months

side_effects.description: Had to force self to eat at times
Previous experience with prescription medication caused deathly illness and non-stop vomiting for 2 months; weight loss from vomiting

protocol_notes: User reported extremely positive experience with retatrutide compared to previous pharmaceutical treatment. States 'such a small dose' with no side effects except appetite suppression. Was on break for 3 months at time of post.
